DISCOVERY 610, APPEARANCES: MATTHEW K. HINDMAN FOR PLAINTIFF AND MOVING PARTY. NO OTHER APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES SET#1 AND REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS SET #1 IS GRANTED IN ITS ENTIRETY. DEFENDANTS ARE ORDERED TO PROVIDE FURTHER VERIFIED RESPONSES WITHOUT OBJECTION TO FORM INTERROGATORIES, RESPOND SEPARATELY TO EACH CATEGORY OF DOCUMENT REQUESTS, AND PRODUCE DOCUMENTS WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. THE COURT FINDS THAT DEFENDANTS FAILED TO RESPOND IN A TIMELY FASHION AND PRODUCE RESPONSIVE DOCUMENTS. MONETARY SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $1236.30 ARE TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. ORDER SIGNED. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

Motion To Compel Compliance With Court'S Order, And For Further Discovery Responses And Production Of Documents From Deft John Wilson And Structural Renovations,Inc.., And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jan-11-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Matthew K. Hindman for plaintiff and moving party Brenda Spriggs-Wiley

NO OTHER APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff's motion to compel compliance with prior order and for further responses to form interrogatories (John Wilson and Structural Renovations Inc.), request for production set #1 (John Wilson and Structural Renovations Inc.), and special interrogatories set #1 is granted. Defendants are ordered to fully comply with the previous order and serve further verified responses to the matters set forth in plaintiff's separate statement of matters in dispute filed in support of the motion within 15 days of notice of this order. Specifically, the Court orders that defendant provide the last known addresses, if any, of Mr. Brown and Chagas. As to the request for production of documents, the objections in response to request #21 as to defendants Wilson and Structural Renovations Inc., having been previously waived, are overruled and stricken. If defendants are unable to comply with a demand for production, any response must fully comply with CCP Section 2031.230. Defendants are further ordered to verify the responses to plaintiff's special interrogatories set #1. The Court finds that defendants failed to comply with the previous order and made evasive responses. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $1236.30 are to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. ORDER SIGNED. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
